# TOC File Format

`<folder>_toc.md` is fully generated. This page documents its structure.

## Output

```markdown
<!-- Auto-generated by build_toc.sh — edit CONTEXT.md instead -->

# {title}

> {description}

## Always Load

*Load these folders whenever you read this TOC:*

- [CODING/](CODING/CODING_toc.md)

## Subfolders

| Folder | Description |
| ------ | ----------- |
| [CODING/](CODING/CODING_toc.md) | Shared coding standards *(read-only)* |
| [DATABASE/](DATABASE/DATABASE_toc.md) | Schema and migration patterns |

## Files

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [architecture.md](architecture.md) | System components |
```

## Sections

| Section | When present |
|---------|--------------|
| Header comment | Always |
| Title + description | Always (from `<folder>.md` description block) |
| Always Load | Only if `eager_read` has entries |
| Subfolders | Always (table or "_No context subfolders found._") |
| Files | Always (table or "_No context files found._") |

## Excluded Files

| Name | Reason |
|------|--------|
| `<folder>.md` | The source file for this TOC |
| `<folder>_toc.md` | This file itself |
| `_*` | Underscore-prefixed (when `skip_underscore: true`) |
| Names in `ignore` list | Explicitly excluded |
